overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic horror game showing a character exploring a foggy rural lakeside town. The character walks along a misty road, explores a wooden dock extending over a lake, passes fishermen at work, and enters a narrow alley between weathered wooden buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy rural town main street with wooden buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy asphalt road through the rural town, passing wooden buildings and utility poles

notable_agents.action: man standing near white plastic chairs outside a wooden building

entered.detail: two-story wooden structure with dark siding and gabled roof
wet asphalt road with double yellow lines running through the town
tall wooden power pole with crossbars and wires
white delivery van parked alongside the road
dense evergreen trees shrouded in heavy fog

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a foggy rural town street with wet asphalt underfoot. Weathered wooden buildings line the road, and a white van is parked on the left. A man stands near white plastic chairs on the right side as the character passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden pier extending over misty lake

events.description: character turns from the road onto a wooden dock leading toward the lake
character stops at the end of the dock to look out at the water and distant boat

agents.ego_description: walking onto the wooden dock and approaching the water's edge to observe the lake and mountains

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a pier extending over the water
calm gray lake water reflecting the foggy sky
small cabin boat floating on the lake with dark hull
misty mountains visible across the lake in the background
simple wooden fence along the edge of the dock

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the road onto a wooden dock extending over a misty lake. The open water stretches ahead with a small fishing boat visible in the distance and mountains looming through the fog. The character walks to the end of the pier and pauses to look out at the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: working dock with fishing equipment and storage

events.description: character turns around and begins walking back along the dock toward the shore

agents.ego_description: walking back along the dock past fishing equipment, crates, and workers

notable_agents.action: fisherman in brown jacket leaning on the railing looking at the water
fisherman working near stacked crates and equipment

entered.detail: stacked plastic and wooden crates used for storing fishing gear
metal crane structure used for lifting boats and heavy equipment
large bundles of fishing nets covered with tarps and netting
large wooden storage building with corrugated metal roof

segments.scene_description: The character walks back along the dock, passing fishermen at work near stacked crates and covered netting. A large wooden warehouse stands on the left, and a metal crane is visible in the background. The dock is cluttered with fishing equipment and storage containers.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between weathered wooden buildings

events.description: character turns from the main street into a narrow dark alley between buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the street past a building with hanging decorations, then entering a narrow alleyway

entered.detail: two-story wooden building with faded paint and multiple windows
strange decorations and objects hanging on the exterior wall of a building
close wooden walls of adjacent buildings creating a tight passage
external wooden staircase leading to upper level of building

segments.scene_description: The character returns to the town street, passing a weathered building with strange hanging decorations on the wall. The character then turns into a narrow, dark alley between wooden buildings, with external stairs visible on the left and high walls enclosing the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a foggy rural street out onto a misty lakeside pier before retreating into the claustrophobic confines of a narrow alley. It begins by following the character along wet asphalt past weathered wooden buildings and a parked white van, passing a man standing by plastic chairs. As the character leaves the road, the scene opens up onto a wooden dock extending over a vast, misty lake where mountains loom in the distance and a small fishing boat drifts in the open water. The camera then tracks backward along the pier, passing fishermen working amidst stacked crates and netting near a large warehouse and a metal crane, before returning to the town street. Finally, the view shifts past a building with strange hanging decorations and turns sharply into a dark, narrow alley enclosed by high wooden walls and external stairs.
